name: golang-github-onsi-ginkgo-dev
title: golang-github-onsi-ginkgo-dev
summary: BDD Testing Framework for Go (development files)
description:
BDD Testing Framework for Go (development files)
Ginkgo is a BDD-style Golang testing framework built to help you efficiently
write expressive and comprehensive tests. It is best paired with the Gomega
matcher library but is designed to be matcher-agnostic.
.
This package contains the development files.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-onsi-ginkgo-dev because BDD Testing Framework for Go (development files).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-onsi-ginkgo-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-onsi-ginkgo-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-onsi-ginkgo-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
